nasb.text: The priests and the prophets and all the people heard Jeremiah speaking these words in the house of the Lord.

esv.text: The priests and the prophets and all the people heard Jeremiah speaking these words in the house of the Lord.

cnv.text: 耶利米在耶和華殿裡所說的這些話，眾祭司、眾先知和眾民都聽見了。

ccb.text: 祭司、先知和民众都听见了耶利米在耶和华的殿里说的这些话。
